description: Synthetic engineering ADR fixtures for regression testing only; not pilot evidence.

sources.title: ADR-001 Local storage
sources.content:
# Local database

Decision: Use SQLite for local metadata and jobs.
Reason: It provides transactional recovery without operating another service.
Alternative: PostgreSQL remains appropriate for a hosted multi-user deployment.

sources.title: ADR-002 Control-plane messaging
sources.content:
# Message bus

Decision: Use NATS for control-plane messaging.
Reason: The workload is modest and NATS reduces broker operational complexity.
Alternative: Kafka was rejected because the throughput requirement does not justify its operations cost.

sources.title: ADR-003 Authentication
sources.content:
# Identity federation

Decision: Use OpenID Connect (OIDC) for user login.
Reason: OIDC integrates with existing identity providers and avoids storing passwords.
Constraint: Enterprise deployments may require SAML federation through an OIDC bridge.

sources.title: ADR-004 Local deployment
sources.content:
# Local packaging

Decision: Use Docker Compose for the self-hosted local stack.
Reason: A single-machine deployment should not require a cluster.
Alternative: Kubernetes was rejected for the local edition because orchestration overhead exceeds the workload.

sources.title: ADR-005 Observability
sources.content:
# Telemetry instrumentation

Decision: Use OpenTelemetry for traces and metrics.
Reason: Vendor-neutral instrumentation keeps hosted and self-hosted backends replaceable.
Constraint: Source content and prompts must never be telemetry attributes.

sources.title: ADR-006 Local caching
sources.content:
# Cache policy

Decision: Use an in-process LRU cache for local query metadata.
Reason: Local mode has one process and does not need network cache coherence.
Alternative: Redis is deferred until a hosted deployment demonstrates cross-process cache requirements.
